message:
feat(http, openapi): async streaming body readers and security schemes

HTTP Streaming (body.rs - 580+ lines):
- Add StreamingBodyConfig with configurable thresholds and chunk sizes
- Implement AsyncBodyReader for streaming large request bodies
- Add DEFAULT_STREAMING_THRESHOLD (64KB) for automatic streaming decisions
- Support backpressure-aware chunk reading via AsyncRead trait
- Add should_stream() helper for content-length based decisions

OpenAPI Security Schemes (spec.rs - 120+ lines):
- Add SecurityRequirement type alias for scheme → scopes mapping
- Add global security field to OpenApi struct
- Add per-operation security override capability
- Implement SecurityScheme enum with variants:
  - ApiKey: name, location (header/query/cookie), description
  - Http: scheme (basic/bearer), bearer_format (JWT), description
  - OAuth2: flows (implicit, password, clientCredentials, authorizationCode)
  - OpenIdConnect: openIdConnectUrl
- Add OAuth2Flows struct with all four flow types
- Add OAuth2Flow struct with authorizationUrl, tokenUrl, refreshUrl, scopes

Additional improvements:
- request.rs: Extended request handling
- extract.rs: New extractor utilities
- lib.rs exports updated across crates
- dependency_tree.rs: Enhanced tree rendering
- trie.rs: Additional route matching improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+    Response,

+    // Path parameter generation
+    converter_to_schema,
+    param_info_to_parameter,
+    path_params_to_parameters,
 };
